content.text:
All 9 active tests pass (1 `it.todo` skipped).

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No changes needed; the existing generic implementation in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-11_01-59-11_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/game-of-life.ts` already handles the vertical-to-horizontal blinker oscillation correctly.
- Result: All 9 tests pass (1 todo skipped).
- Approach: The blinker test (`[[0,0],[0,1],[0,2]]` → `[[-1,1],[0,1],[1,1]]`) is fully covered by the existing neighbor-counting logic plus the survival/reproduction rule (`neighborCount === 3 || (isAlive && neighborCount === 2)`). No minimal change required since the implementation generalized during the previous Green/Refactor phases already satisfies this test.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
